note: Fresh sources gathered during red-team of V01. access=fetch means page fetched this mission via WebFetch; access=search means content obtained from WebSearch result snippet this mission.

sources.title: PyroGenesis APT-HP product page (200 kW-2 MW scalable; cathode life up to 1,000 h, anode up to 500 h; fully automated; ash vitrification/waste applications)
sources.supports: Torch OEM already sells modern automated torch systems with stated electrode life; occupies V01's claimed spec ground.

sources.title: PyroGenesis plasma torches overview (5 torch lines: APT-HP, APT, SPT, RPT, MINIGUN)
sources.supports: Breadth of incumbent torch product lines incl. waste vitrification.

sources.title: PyroGenesis PR: 4.5 MW plasma torch delivered to US aeronautics/defense client
sources.supports: Incumbent ships turnkey MW-class torch systems (torch + peripherals incl. power supply).

sources.title: US Patent 9,950,387 - Plasma torch power circuit and cooling system (PyroGenesis IGBT PSU)
sources.supports: Torch OEM holds granted patents on modern IGBT torch power circuits - the 'modern PSU' position is occupied and IP-fenced.

sources.title: US Patent 12,471,260 - IGBT temperature dampening systems and methods
sources.supports: Recent (2025-class) torch-PSU IGBT patent activity by incumbent.

sources.title: Westinghouse Plasma torches page (WPCT540: 280-530 kW, 650 A max; two separate power supplies, arc and field-coil currents independently controlled)
sources.supports: Closed-loop, dual-loop arc control is already standard in incumbent MW torch systems; site fetch failed (expired cert) - data from search snippet this mission.

sources.title: US Patent 4,683,367 (1987) - Method and device for controlling erosion of plasma torch electrodes
sources.supports: PSU-side electrode-erosion control is 40-year-old prior art, not a new category.

sources.title: US Patent 5,393,954 - Plasma torch power supply equalizing wear to prolong electrode lifespan
sources.supports: Wear-extending PSU concept specifically is patented prior art (1995).

sources.title: Hrabovsky et al., Effect of DC current fluctuations on plasma jet properties (300 Hz thyristor vs 30 kHz HF converter)
sources.supports: Ripple matters (current zeros extinguish arc, peaks degrade electrodes) but is one factor among several - physics check.

sources.title: Arc root dynamics in high power plasma torches (Pramana journal)
sources.supports: Anode erosion governed by arc-root attachment mode/residence time, gas dynamics - torch-side physics a PSU cannot fully control.

sources.title: Yantai Longyuan Power Technology profile (CHN Energy/Guoneng KH): plasma ignition industrialized at scale, modular DC switching PSU + torch generator tech, 2004 national S&T prize
sources.supports: Chinese SOE has mass-produced integrated plasma torch + modern switching DC PSU systems for two decades.

sources.title: Yantai Longyuan wins China's first ship-based plasma solid-waste treatment project (Jan 2026)
sources.supports: Longyuan is expanding from ignition into plasma waste treatment - direct entry into V01's segment with in-house PSUs.

sources.title: CAEA: CGN plasma hazardous-waste treatment 'shenqi' (Qingyuan Guangdong demonstration; ~40-patent plasma core cluster)
sources.supports: CGN owns plasma waste tech vertically (torch + PSU + plant) - not a PSU retrofit buyer.

sources.title: CCNTA: SWIP (Southwestern Institute of Physics) plasma medical/hazardous waste treatment industrialization
sources.supports: The nuclear-institute program cited in G02-18 is itself the vertically integrated torch+PSU supplier in China.

sources.title: Magna-Power ML Series: 500 kW and 1 MW programmable DC supplies, scalable to 10 MW, current-fed topology
sources.supports: Merchant catalog MW-class DC supplies already exist at V01's power class and below its ASP.

sources.title: Injet (Sichuan Yingjie Electric) product page: RF/plasma power supplies (PECVD, etch, sputter) + industrial power leadership
sources.supports: Chinese industrial-PSU leader already sells plasma power supplies; trivial adjacency into DC torch class.

sources.title: Advanced Energy plasma power products (zh-cn product family)
sources.supports: Global plasma-PSU specialist incumbent exists (thin-film class today, arc adjacency).

sources.title: PitchBook: Europlasma company profile (stock $0.24, market cap ~$1.4M as of Jan 2026)
sources.supports: The flagship Western legacy-torch operator/OEM is financially distressed - retrofit buyer pool weakness.

sources.title: Europlasma regulated information: OCABSA bond financing up to EUR 30M implying >99% potential dilution
sources.supports: Confirms distress financing at the named Western incumbent/operator.

sources.title: MEE National Encouraged Major Environmental Technology Equipment Catalog (2023) case annex: Jiangsu Tianying plasma melting equipment for incineration residues
sources.supports: Listed Chinese waste major already sells plasma melting furnaces - another vertically integrated non-buyer.
